---
title: 'Favor brings Chick Filet'
date: '2010-07-04T23:23:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3378684368176008912'
blogger_filename: '/2010/07/favor-brings-chick-filet.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

In training we were divided into four teams. My team fell behind and in the end won the two week contest by being the only ones to participate in the talent show. Got a five dollar Chick Fillet Gift Card.
